name: Peanut-Chicken Skewers
recipeIngredient: 2 sweet bell peppers, red or green, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice each breast half into four lengthwise strips; set aside.
2. In a stainless steel, glass, or ceramic bowl, combine peanut butter, cilantro, chili sauce, salt, cayenne, black pepper, lemon juice, brown sugar, soy sauce, green onion, and garlic. Add chicken strips, cover, and let marinate overnight or up to 2 days.
3. Soak bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes. Preheat broiler or prepare charcoal fire. Thread chicken strips onto the skewers like serpents, with pepper cubes interspersed. Broil or grill for 5 to 6 minutes, turning once. Serve garnished with minced parsley.
